```{r warning=FALSE}
for (m in 1:length(selected_list)) {
  selected_data <- grep(paste(c("Length"),collapse="|"),  colnames(selected_list[[m]]))
  length_mat<- selected_list[[m]][, selected_data ]
  length_mat_avg<- length_mat %>% forecast::ma(3) %>% as.ts() # smoothening 1
  colnames(length_mat_avg)<-colnames(length_mat)
  
  mts_dim<- dim(length_mat_avg)
    for (n in 1:mts_dim[2]){
      length_mat_avg[, n][length_mat_avg[ , colnames(length_mat_avg)[n]] > - thres] <- 0 
    }
  length_mat_avg <- length_mat_avg %>% as.data.frame() 
  length_mat_avg$sum <- length_mat_avg  %>% rowSums()  # We sum up the extent of retraction at each time point
  mts_stationary_neg_list[[m]] <- length_mat_avg %>% ts(frequency = freq, start = c(0, 1)) 
}

names(mts_stationary_neg_list) <- names(length_list)

```

# Separate the extension/retraction and not polarized/not polarized
```{r}
mts_stationary_pos_list_polarized <- mts_stationary_pos_list
mts_stationary_pos_list_Notpolarized <- mts_stationary_pos_list

for (n in 1:length(mts_stationary_pos_list)){
  
  imgName <- names(mts_stationary_pos_list)[n]
  
  # label the data before and after the time point of polarization
  df <- mts_stationary_pos_list[[n]] %>% as.data.table()
  df$Time <- seq( from = 0, to =  (nrow(df)-1) ) *2
  df$polarized <- "polarized"

  df[Time <  polarityPoint_df[Image == imgName]$Time]$polarized <- "not_polarized"
  
  # extract the data before and after the time point of polarization
  df1 <- df[polarized == "polarized"]
  mts_stationary_pos_list_polarized[[n]] <- df1[ ,c("Time","polarized"):=NULL]
  
  df2  <- df[polarized == "not_polarized"]
  mts_stationary_pos_list_Notpolarized[[n]]  <- df2[ ,c("Time","polarized"):=NULL]
  
}

names(mts_stationary_pos_list_polarized) <- names(mts_stationary_pos_list)
#mts_stationary_pos_list_polarized <- purrr::keep(mts_stationary_pos_list_polarized, ~ nrow(.x) >25) # remove cells w less than 25 time points

names(mts_stationary_pos_list_Notpolarized) <- names(mts_stationary_pos_list)
#mts_stationary_pos_list_Notpolarized<- purrr::keep(mts_stationary_pos_list_Notpolarized, ~ nrow(.x) >25) # remove cells w less than 25 time points

mts_stationary_neg_list_polarized <- mts_stationary_neg_list
mts_stationary_neg_list_Notpolarized <- mts_stationary_neg_list

for (n in 1:length(mts_stationary_neg_list)){
  
  imgName <- names(mts_stationary_neg_list)[n]
  
  # label the data before and after the time point of polarization
  df <- mts_stationary_neg_list[[n]] %>% as.data.table()
  df$Time <- seq( from = 0, to =  (nrow(df)-1) ) *2
  df$polarized <- "polarized"

  df[Time <  polarityPoint_df[Image == imgName]$Time]$polarized <- "not_polarized"
  
  # extract the data before and after the time point of polarization
  df1 <- df[polarized == "polarized"]
  mts_stationary_neg_list_polarized[[n]] <- df1[ ,c("Time","polarized"):=NULL]
  
  df2  <- df[polarized == "not_polarized"]
  mts_stationary_neg_list_Notpolarized[[n]]  <- df2[ ,c("Time","polarized"):=NULL]
  
}

names(mts_stationary_neg_list_polarized) <- names(mts_stationary_neg_list)
#mts_stationary_neg_list_polarized <- purrr::keep(mts_stationary_neg_list_polarized, ~ nrow(.x) >25 ) # remove cells w less than 25 time points

names(mts_stationary_neg_list_Notpolarized) <- names(mts_stationary_neg_list)
#mts_stationary_neg_list_Notpolarized<- purrr::keep(mts_stationary_neg_list_Notpolarized, ~ nrow(.x) >25 ) # remove cells w less than 25 time points
```

```{r}
ext_ret_list <- list(Ext_Notpolarized = mts_stationary_pos_list_Notpolarized, Ext_polarized = mts_stationary_pos_list_polarized, Ret_Notpolarized = mts_stationary_neg_list_Notpolarized, Ret_polarized = mts_stationary_neg_list_polarized)

# remove cell with no pre-polarization time points
ext_ret_list[["Ret_Notpolarized"]][["DIV1_LifeactmSC_02_14_R3D_D3D.tif"]] <- NULL
ext_ret_list[["Ext_Notpolarized"]][["DIV1_LifeactmSC_02_14_R3D_D3D.tif"]] <- NULL

ext_ret_list[["Ret_Notpolarized"]][["WT_DIV1_LAmSC_01_13_R3D_D3D.tif"]] <- NULL
ext_ret_list[["Ext_Notpolarized"]][["WT_DIV1_LAmSC_01_13_R3D_D3D.tif"]] <- NULL

ext_ret_list[["Ret_Notpolarized"]][["WT_DIV1_LAmSC_01_16_R3D_D3D-2.tif"]] <- NULL
ext_ret_list[["Ext_Notpolarized"]][["WT_DIV1_LAmSC_01_16_R3D_D3D-2.tif"]] <- NULL

ext_ret_list[["Ret_Notpolarized"]][["WT_DIV2_LAmSC_02_06_R3D_D3D.tif"]] <- NULL
ext_ret_list[["Ext_Notpolarized"]][["WT_DIV2_LAmSC_02_06_R3D_D3D.tif"]] <- NULL

ext_ret_list[["Ret_Notpolarized"]][["WT_DIV2_LAmSC_02_24_R3D_D3D.tif"]] <- NULL
ext_ret_list[["Ext_Notpolarized"]][["WT_DIV2_LAmSC_02_24_R3D_D3D.tif"]] <- NULL

ext_ret_list[["Ret_Notpolarized"]][["WT_DIV2_LAmSC_02_36_R3D_D3D.tif"]] <- NULL
ext_ret_list[["Ext_Notpolarized"]][["WT_DIV2_LAmSC_02_36_R3D_D3D.tif"]] <- NULL

ext_ret_list[["Ret_Notpolarized"]][["WT_DIV2_LAmSC_02_38_R3D_D3D.tif"]] <- NULL
ext_ret_list[["Ext_Notpolarized"]][["WT_DIV2_LAmSC_02_38_R3D_D3D.tif"]] <- NULL

ext_ret_list[["Ret_Notpolarized"]][["WT_DIV2_LAmSC_02_40_R3D_D3D.tif"]] <- NULL
ext_ret_list[["Ext_Notpolarized"]][["WT_DIV2_LAmSC_02_40_R3D_D3D.tif"]] <- NULL
```

## extension and retraction lifetime (duration)
```{r}
thres <- 0.00

 list_duration <- list()  

for (k in 1:length (ext_ret_list )){

 list_1 <- list()    
 list_k <- ext_ret_list[[k]]
  
  for (m in 1:length(list_k)){
  
  df <- list_k[[m]] %>% as.data.table()
  df <- df[, !"sum"] %>% abs() %>% as.data.frame()
  df<- df[, (colSums(df, na.rm = T) != 0)] %>% as.data.table()
  
  list_2 <-  list()
  
   for (n in 1: ncol(df)){
    
    df2 <- df[ ,..n]
    df2$time <- seq(0, (nrow(df2)-1), 1)
    df2 <- df2[complete.cases(df2), ] 
    
    df2$inside <- df2[ , 1] > thres
    df2$start  <- ! c(FALSE, df2$inside[-nrow(df2)]) & df2$inside
    df2$end    <- df2$inside & ! c(df2$inside[-1], FALSE)  # Not used
    df2 <- df2[ df2$inside, ]
    df2$group  <- cumsum(df2$start)  # Number the spells
    colnames(df2)[1] <- "velocity"
    
    df3 <- plyr::ddply( df2, "group", summarize,
                        start  = min(time),
                        end    = max(time),
                        length = length(velocity),
                        mean   = mean(velocity))
   
    df3$neurite <- names(df)[n]
    
    # df3$neurite_length <- length_list[[m]][1,n] 
    list_2[[n]] <- df3
   }
  
  df3<- list_2 %>% data.table::rbindlist()
  df3$cell<- names(ext_ret_list[[k]])[m]
  df3$growth_polarization <- names(ext_ret_list)[k]

  list_1[[m]] <- df3
  }
 
 duration_df <- list_1 %>% data.table::rbindlist()

 list_duration [[k]] <-  duration_df
}
```

```{r}
duration_df <- list_duration  %>% data.table::rbindlist()
duration_df$length <- duration_df$length/freq
duration_df$cell_neurite <- paste(duration_df$cell, duration_df$neurite, sep = "_")
duration_df$axon_minor <- "Minor"

max_length_neurite_list <- list()
for (m in 1: length(length_list)){
  
   df1 <- length_list[[m]] 
   k <- df1 %>% tail(1)  %>% max.col() # filter for the column with the max final length as the axon
   df <- data.frame( neurite= names(df1)[[k]],  cell=names(length_list)[m])
   df$cell_neurite<- paste(df$cell, df$neurite, sep = "_")
  max_length_neurite_list[[m]] <- df %>% as.data.table()
}

max_length_neurite <- max_length_neurite_list %>% data.table::rbindlist()
duration_df[cell_neurite %in% max_length_neurite$cell_neurite]$axon_minor <- "Axon"
```

# Data points at cell level
```{r}
df_summary_duration <-duration_df %>% 
 group_by(cell, growth_polarization, axon_minor) %>% 
  rstatix::get_summary_stats(length) %>% as.data.table()
```

```{r}
# add sample labeling for grouping and batch control
df_summary_duration$ID<- paste (df_summary_duration$cell, df_summary_duration$growth_polarization, df_summary_duration$axon_minor,   sep = "_")
df_summary_duration$group<- paste (df_summary_duration$axon_minor, df_summary_duration$growth_polarization,  sep = "_")
```

```{r}
df_summary_duration$batch<- "_"
df_summary_duration[grep("170905", df_summary_duration$cell), ]$batch <- "170905"
df_summary_duration[grep("DIV1_LifeactmSC", df_summary_duration$cell), ]$batch <- "240604"
df_summary_duration[grep("Long2", df_summary_duration$cell), ]$batch <- "180109"
df_summary_duration[grep("Long_LifeactmScar_01", df_summary_duration$cell), ]$batch <- "180207"

df_summary_duration[grep("Long_LifeactmScar_03", df_summary_duration$cell), ]$batch <- "170921"
df_summary_duration[grep("Long_LifeactmScar_02", df_summary_duration$cell), ]$batch <- "180205"

df_summary_duration[grep("WT_DIV1", df_summary_duration$cell), ]$batch <- "240702_DIV1"
df_summary_duration[grep("WT_DIV2", df_summary_duration$cell), ]$batch <- "240702_DIV2"
```

```{r}
outliers <- df_summary_duration %>% 
  group_by(axon_minor, growth_polarization) %>% 
 rstatix::identify_outliers(mean) 

df_summary_duration<- df_summary_duration[! (ID %in% outliers$ID)]
```

```{r}
duration_df %>% group_by(cell, growth_polarization, neurite) %>% dplyr::summarise(n = n())

table(df_summary_duration$cell)
```

# generate pairwise comparison list
```{r}
my_comparisons <- df_summary_duration$group %>% unique() %>% as.character() %>% combn(2, simplify = FALSE) 

my_comparisons <- list(c("Axon_Ext_Notpolarized",  "Minor_Ext_Notpolarized"), c("Axon_Ext_polarized",  "Minor_Ext_polarized"), c("Axon_Ret_Notpolarized",  "Minor_Ret_Notpolarized"), c("Axon_Ret_polarized",  "Minor_Ret_polarized"), c("Axon_Ext_Notpolarized","Axon_Ext_polarized"), c("Minor_Ext_Notpolarized","Minor_Ext_polarized"), c("Axon_Ret_Notpolarized","Axon_Ret_polarized"), c("Minor_Ret_Notpolarized","Minor_Ret_polarized"))
```

```{r message = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=10}
# my_comparisons <- list(c("axon", "minor"))
#pj <- position_jitter(seed = 1, width = .1, height = 0)

df_summary_duration  %>% mutate(group = fct_relevel(group,  "Axon_Ext_Notpolarized",  "Minor_Ext_Notpolarized", "Axon_Ext_polarized",     "Minor_Ext_polarized" ,   "Axon_Ret_Notpolarized",  "Minor_Ret_Notpolarized", "Axon_Ret_polarized","Minor_Ret_polarized")) %>% 
  
ggplot ( aes(x=group, y=mean, fill =axon_minor) )+ 
  scale_fill_brewer(palette="Dark2") + 
  theme_classic()+
geom_violin(aes(), trim=F,  kernel ="gaussian", adjust=1)  +
 geom_boxplot(aes(), width=0.2, outlier.colour = NA, fill="white")+ 
# geom_jitter(aes(), shape=16, position=position_jitter(0.1))+ #aes(color = batch)
  
  # geom_line(aes(group = Image))+
   geom_point(size=1) +
 geom_path(aes(group = cell),alpha = 0.2)+
    
 scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(0, 70), breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 5))+ 
# geom_signif(comparisons = my_comparisons ,test = "wilcox.test",  color="black")+
 stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons, paired=F, method="wilcox.test", 
                     #label.y = c(7, 7.5, 8, 8.5, 9, 9.5, 10, 10.5), 
                     label = "{p.adj.format}{p.adj.signif}") +

  theme_ipsum(grid = F, ticks = T) +
  theme_linedraw()+
   theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
        plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "right",
        axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold", angle = 90)) #for centering the text 
```

```{r}
ggsave(
  "ext_ret_duration_thres_0.pdf",
  plot = last_plot(),
  device = "pdf")
```

# merge pre-axon and minor of unpolarized neurons into one group
```{r}
df_summary_duration$group_2 <- df_summary_duration$group
df_summary_duration[grepl("Notpolarized", growth_polarization)]$group_2 <- df_summary_duration[grepl("Notpolarized", growth_polarization)]$growth_polarization

my_comparisons <- list( c("Axon_Ext_polarized",  "Minor_Ext_polarized"),  c("Axon_Ret_polarized",  "Minor_Ret_polarized"), c("Ext_Notpolarized","Axon_Ext_polarized"), c("Ext_Notpolarized","Minor_Ext_polarized"), c("Ret_Notpolarized","Axon_Ret_polarized"), c("Ret_Notpolarized","Minor_Ret_polarized"))
```

```{r message = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=10}
# my_comparisons <- list(c("axon", "minor"))
#pj <- position_jitter(seed = 1, width = .1, height = 0)

df_summary_duration  %>% mutate(group_2 = fct_relevel(group_2,  "Ext_Notpolarized",  "Axon_Ext_polarized",     "Minor_Ext_polarized" ,   "Ret_Notpolarized", "Axon_Ret_polarized","Minor_Ret_polarized")) %>% 
  
ggplot ( aes(x=group_2, y=mean) )+ 
  scale_fill_brewer(palette="Dark2") + 
  theme_classic()+
geom_violin(aes(), trim=F,  kernel ="gaussian", adjust=1, scale="area")  +
 geom_boxplot(aes(), width=0.2, outlier.colour = NA, fill="white")+ 
geom_jitter(aes(), shape=16, position=position_jitter(0.1))+ #aes(color = batch)
  
  # geom_line(aes(group = Image))+
 #  geom_point(size=1) +
 #geom_path(aes(group = cell),alpha = 0.2)+
    
 scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(0, 50), breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 5))+ 
# geom_signif(comparisons = my_comparisons ,test = "wilcox.test",  color="black")+
 stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons, paired=F, method="wilcox.test", 
                     label.y = c(42, 42, 42, 45, 42, 45), 
                     label = "{p.adj.format}{p.adj.signif}") +

  theme_ipsum(grid = F, ticks = T) +
  theme_linedraw()+
   theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
        plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "right",
        axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold", angle = 90)) #for centering the text 
```

```{r}
ggsave(
  "ext_ret_duration_2.pdf",
  plot = last_plot(),
  device = "pdf")
```

# extension and retraction velocity
```{r}
ext_ret_list_2 <- ext_ret_list
for (n in 1: length(ext_ret_list)){
  
  list_1 <- ext_ret_list[[n]]
  sample_name <- names(list_1)
  
  for (m in 1:length(list_1)){
  
    df <- list_1[[m]] %>% as.data.frame()
    df [ df == 0 ] <- NA # replace zero with NA to avoid zero inflation
    df1 <- colMeans(df, na.rm = T)  %>% as.data.frame() # calculate the average velocity through the observation window. Or matrixStats::colMedians
    colnames(df1) <- "mean_vel"
    df1$median_vel <- df %>% as.matrix() %>% matrixStats::colMedians(na.rm = T)  # calculate the average velocity through the observation window. Or matrixStats::colMedians
    
    df1$cond <- "WT"
    df1$cell <- names(list_1)[m]
    df1$neurite <- rownames(df1)
    df1 <- df1 %>% subset (df1$neurite !="sum")
    
    df1$axon_minor <- "Minor"
    k <- length_list[[names(list_1)[m]]] %>% tail(1)  %>% max.col() # filter for the column with the max final length as the axon
    df1$axon_minor[k]  <- "Axon" 
    df1$growth_polarization <- names(ext_ret_list)[[n]]

   list_1 [[m]] <- df1 %>% as.data.table()
      
    }
  
  names(list_1)<- sample_name

  ext_ret_list_2 [[n]] <- list_1 %>% reduce(bind_rows)  %>% as.data.frame()
}

velocity_comb_df <- ext_ret_list_2 %>% reduce(bind_rows)  %>% as.data.table()

# label extension and retraction 
velocity_comb_df$Growth<- "Extension"
velocity_comb_df[mean_vel <0]$Growth <- "Retraction"

# convert retraction velocity to positive value
velocity_comb_df$mean_vel <- velocity_comb_df$mean_vel %>% abs()
velocity_comb_df$median_vel <- velocity_comb_df$median_vel %>% abs()

velocity_comb_df[mean_vel == "NaN"]$mean_vel <- 0
velocity_comb_df[median_vel == "NaN"]$median_vel <- 0
```

```{r}
velocity_comb_df[Growth=="Retraction"] %>% ggplot(aes(x=median_vel, y=length) ) +
  scale_x_continuous( expand = c(0, 0),  limits = c(0, 1),  breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 5)) +
  geom_point()
```

# Data points at cell level (axon vs minor neurites; extension vs retraction: not polarized vs polarized)
```{r}
df_summary_vel <-velocity_comb_df %>% 
  group_by(cell, growth_polarization, axon_minor) %>% 
  rstatix::get_summary_stats(median_vel, mean_vel) %>% as.data.table()

df_summary_vel$ID<- paste (df_summary_vel$cell, df_summary_vel$axon_minor, df_summary_vel$growth_polarization, sep = "_")
df_summary_vel$group<- paste (df_summary_vel$axon_minor, df_summary_vel$growth_polarization, sep = "_")
```

```{r}
outliers <- df_summary_vel %>% 
  group_by(growth_polarization, axon_minor, variable) %>% 
 rstatix::identify_outliers(mean) 

df_summary_vel <- df_summary_vel[! (ID %in% outliers$ID)]
```

```{r}
my_comparisons <- df_summary_median_vel$group %>% unique() %>% as.character() %>% combn(2, simplify = FALSE) 
my_comparisons <- list(c("Axon_Ext_Notpolarized",  "Minor_Ext_Notpolarized"), c("Axon_Ext_polarized",  "Minor_Ext_polarized"), c("Axon_Ret_Notpolarized",  "Minor_Ret_Notpolarized"), c("Axon_Ret_polarized",  "Minor_Ret_polarized"), c("Axon_Ext_Notpolarized","Axon_Ext_polarized"), c("Minor_Ext_Notpolarized","Minor_Ext_polarized"), c("Axon_Ret_Notpolarized","Axon_Ret_polarized"), c("Minor_Ret_Notpolarized","Minor_Ret_polarized"))
```

```{r message = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=10}
#pj <- position_jitter(seed = 1, width = .1, height = 0)

df_summary_vel[variable == "mean_vel"]  %>%  
  
  mutate(group = fct_relevel(group,  "Axon_Ext_Notpolarized",  
                             "Minor_Ext_Notpolarized", 
                             "Axon_Ext_polarized",     
                             "Minor_Ext_polarized" ,   
                             "Axon_Ret_Notpolarized",  
                             "Minor_Ret_Notpolarized", 
                             "Axon_Ret_polarized",
                             "Minor_Ret_polarized")) %>% 
  
ggplot ( aes(x=group, y=mean, fill =axon_minor))+ 
  
  scale_fill_brewer(palette="Dark2") + 

 geom_violin(aes(), trim=F,  kernel ="gaussian", adjust=1)  +
 geom_boxplot(aes(), width=0.2, outlier.colour = NA, fill="white")+ 
 geom_jitter(aes(), shape=16, position=position_jitter(0.1))+
  
 # geom_line(aes(group = Image))+
 # geom_point(size=1) +
 # geom_path(aes(group = cell),alpha = 0.5)+
    
 scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(-0.2, 3), breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 5))+ 
# geom_signif(comparisons = my_comparisons ,test = "wilcox.test",  color="black")+
  stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons, paired=F, method="wilcox.test", 
                     #label.y = c(1.15, 1.2, 1.25, 1.3, 1.35, 1.4), 
                     label = "{p.adj.format}{p.adj.signif}") +
  
  theme_classic() + theme_ipsum(grid = F, ticks = T) + theme_linedraw()+
  
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
        plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "right",
        axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold", angle = 90)) #for centering the text 
```

```{r}
table(df_summary_median_vel$cell)
```

```{r}
ggsave(
  "Axon_minor_velocities_2.pdf",
  plot = last_plot(),
  device = "pdf")
```

```{r}
df_summary_vel$group_2 <- df_summary_vel$group
df_summary_vel[grepl("Notpolarized", growth_polarization)]$group_2 <- df_summary_vel[grepl("Notpolarized", growth_polarization)]$growth_polarization

my_comparisons <- list( c("Axon_Ext_polarized",  "Minor_Ext_polarized"),  c("Axon_Ret_polarized",  "Minor_Ret_polarized"), c("Ext_Notpolarized","Axon_Ext_polarized"), c("Ext_Notpolarized","Minor_Ext_polarized"), c("Ret_Notpolarized","Axon_Ret_polarized"), c("Ret_Notpolarized","Minor_Ret_polarized"))
```

```{r message = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=10}
# my_comparisons <- list(c("axon", "minor"))
#pj <- position_jitter(seed = 1, width = .1, height = 0)

df_summary_vel[variable == "median_vel"]  %>% mutate(group_2 = fct_relevel(group_2,  "Ext_Notpolarized",  "Axon_Ext_polarized",     "Minor_Ext_polarized" ,   "Ret_Notpolarized", "Axon_Ret_polarized","Minor_Ret_polarized")) %>% 
  
ggplot ( aes(x=group_2, y=mean) )+ 
  scale_fill_brewer(palette="Dark2") + 
  theme_classic()+
geom_violin(aes(), trim=F,  kernel ="gaussian", adjust=1, scale="area")  +
 geom_boxplot(aes(), width=0.2, outlier.colour = NA, fill="white")+ 
geom_jitter(aes(), shape=16, position=position_jitter(0.1))+ #aes(color = batch)
  
  # geom_line(aes(group = Image))+
 #  geom_point(size=1) +
 #geom_path(aes(group = cell),alpha = 0.2)+
    
 scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(-0.2, 1.5), breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 8))+ 
# geom_signif(comparisons = my_comparisons ,test = "wilcox.test",  color="black")+
 stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons, paired=F, method="wilcox.test", 
                     label.y = c(1.2, 1.2, 1.2, 1.3, 1.2, 1.3), 
                     label = "{p.adj.format}{p.adj.signif}") +

  theme_ipsum(grid = F, ticks = T) +
  theme_linedraw()+
   theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
        plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "right",
        axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold")) #for centering the text 
```

```{r}
ggsave(
  "Axon_minor_velocities_3.pdf",
  plot = last_plot(),
  device = "pdf")
```

Try executing this chunk by clicking the *Run* button within the chunk or by placing your cursor inside it and pressing *Ctrl+Shift+Enter*. 

Add a new chunk by clicking the *Insert Chunk* button on the toolbar or by pressing *Ctrl+Alt+I*.

When you save the notebook, an HTML file containing the code and output will be saved alongside it (click the *Preview* button or press *Ctrl+Shift+K* to preview the HTML file).

The preview shows you a rendered HTML copy of the contents of the editor. Consequently, unlike *Knit*, *Preview* does not run any R code chunks. Instead, the output of the chunk when it was last run in the editor is displayed.
